notes: Texas State HOT is 6% of gross rental receipts. Registration required before first booking. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Account number filing portal credentials due date cadence (typically 20th of following month).
Austin Local HOT is 11% total (9% City + 2% County/Venue). Registration required before listing activation. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Account number filing portal access filing due dates.
STR income must be reported on Schedule E (rental income) or Schedule C (if operating as business). Track all deductible expenses. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Whether separate EIN obtained or using SSN.
Texas has no state income tax but may have franchise tax if operating as LLC/corporation. FACTUAL DATA MISSING: Business structure applicability (depends on LCP-003 decision).
